intro: I'm your Alivo companion. I can chat, share something interesting, or just keep you company. What would you like to talk about?

safety.support: I hear you. That sounds really tough. You're not alone.
safety.helpline: If you're in crisis right now, please call the helpline: 988 (free, 24/7).

conversation.goodbye: It was nice talking! I'm always here, write anytime. 💙
